svg.text: Chrome & Edge extension · All data stays in your browser · Willis College

text.tspan: No data ever leaves your browser.
Grades travel: Moodle DOM → browser storage → Nova form fields. That's it.

svg.text: Only needed once. Takes about 2 minutes.
4. Pin the extension to your toolbar 📌
Hostname only — no https:// or trailing slash
✓ Reload Moodle & Nova tabs after saving
Navigate to the Moodle gradebook for your course.

g.text: Navigate to the Moodle gradebook for your course
The orange bar appears at the top of the page (click ▼ MNS to expand if collapsed)
Use the dropdown to select the grade column — pick a "total" column for grouped activities
Click Capture (one activity) or Capture All (every activity at once)

svg.text: Navigate to the Nova grade-entry page for the same course.

g.text: Navigate to the Nova grade-entry page for the same course
The blue bar appears at the top — expand if needed by clicking ▼ MNS
Click Preview next to any row → verify student name matches and grade values
Click Fill → grade fields are populated for that row. Or click Fill All for all rows at once.
A count is shown: ✓ Filled 22 / 24. Unmatched students appear in the browser console (F12).

svg.text: Review Visually, Then Submit in Nova
The extension fills fields — you submit. Always do a spot-check first.
After filling, scroll through Nova's table and verify the grades look correct.
Then click Nova's Save button as you normally would. Unmatched students must be graded manually.
PREVIEW PANEL — WHAT YOU SEE BEFORE FILLING

g.text: ✓ Green row — student name matched exactly
⚠ Yellow row — fuzzy match (check the name carefully)
✗ Red row — no match found (fill manually in Nova)
The auto-selected activity is the best name match.
You can change it manually from the dropdown if needed.
Open F12 → Console tab — unmatched students
are listed by name for manual follow-up in Nova.
Options page → check hostnames → Save → reload tab
F12 → Console → look for mns- errors → contact author
Capture from Moodle first; check blue bar shows timestamp
F12 → Console for name list; fill manually in Nova
Multiple activities map to one Nova row
Options → Course Mappings JSON → define per-course rules

svg.text: Moodle → Nova Grade Sync v4.6.0 · All data stays in your browser · No external servers
